source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
a-sup'-im, (beth ha-'acuppim):

King James Version, margin "gatherings"; the Revised Version (British and American) "the storehouses." In Ne 12:25, the King James Version renders the same word thresholds(King James Version, margin "treasuries, assemblies"). A storehouse most probably at the southern gate of the temple (1Ch 26:15,17; Ne 12:25).
